zh.Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭金洛-爾波特莫亞可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Arnot of Arnot於1385年出生在蘇格蘭金洛-爾波特莫亞可時，他的父親Sir William Arnot25歲，母親Mary Brown25歲。他和Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他於1420年住在英國蘇格蘭費伏代薩特。他去世於1450年在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪享年65歲。

zh-hans.Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰金洛-爾波特莫亞可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Arnot of Arnot于1385年出生在苏格兰金洛-爾波特莫亞可时，他的父亲Sir William Arnot25岁，母亲Mary Brown25岁。他和Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他于1420年住在英国苏格兰費伏代薩特。他去世于1450年在苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arnot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Arnold . This surname is very rare in Germany. In North America, it may also be an altered form of the variant Arnodt.

variants.name: Arnott
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place called Arnot in Portmoak, Kinross.
Scottish and English: variant of   Arnold  .

variants.name: Jarnot
meanings: Polish: from the personal name Jarnot, an adaptation of German Arnot . It occurs mainly in western part of Greater Poland and on the borderland of Silesia and Lesser Poland (the areas of old German settlement in Poland).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Arnot of Arnot was born in 1385, in Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Arnot, was 25 and his mother, Mary Brown, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto. He lived in Dysart, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom in 1420. He died in 1450, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Arnot of Arnot est né en 1385, à Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Arnot, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Brown, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto. Il a vécu à Dysart, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni en 1420. Il est décédé en 1450, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Arnot of Arnot 1385 in Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Arnot 25 und seine Mutter Mary Brown 25. Er hatte mit Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1420 hat er in Dysart, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Arnot of Arnot è nato il nel 1385 nel Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Arnot, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary Brown, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto. Vissuto a Dysart, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito nel 1420. Morì nel 1450, nel Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Arnot of Arnotが1385年にスコットランドキンロス-シュアイアポルトモアクで生まれた時，父Sir William Arnotは25歳，母Mary Brownは25歳であった。彼はMarjorie Boswell of Balmutoとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1420年にはイギリススコットランドフィフディサルトに住んでいた。彼は1450年にスコットランドフィフキルクカルディで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Arnot of Arnot(이)가 1385년 스컷랜드 킨로스-실르 포트모크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Arnot(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Brown(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1420년도에 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 다이사르트에서 살았다. 그는 1450년 스컷랜드 피프 커크캘디에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Arnot of Arnot nasceu em 1385, em Portmoak, Kinross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Arnot, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Brown, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto. Ele viveu em Dysart, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom em 1420. Ele faleceu em 1450, em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Arnot of Arnot родился в 1385 г. в местности портмоак, кинросс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Arnot было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Brown, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto. Он жил в местности дисарт, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в 1420 году. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Marjorie Boswell of Balmuto. Vivió en Dysart, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido en 1420. Murió en 1450, en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
